DocumentationSubject.Summary: `meta-analytics` owns common analytics concepts that can be realized through target-specific tabular or multidimensional models.
Required. Directory where the empty MetaAnalytics workspace will be created.
Declare a base measure aggregate function.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add a typed table attribute or calculated attribute.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Add object-level security for an attribute.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
Declare an attribute relationship inside a table.
Optional. Workspace path. Default: current working directory.
